name: Buildertrend Construction Management API
what_it_does: Buildertrend REST API for residential construction management platform. Enables AI agents to retrieve project and job data, manage schedules and work orders, access customer communication logs, retrieve financial and budget data, and integrate Buildertrend into contractor business workflows. Buildertrend is focused on home builders, remodelers, and residential contractors.
use_cases: Retrieving project schedules and milestone data from construction coordination agents
Accessing work order and change order data from contractor operations agents
Retrieving budget and financial data from construction accounting agents
Integrating Buildertrend job data into CRM and invoicing workflow agents
best_when: A residential home builder or remodeler using Buildertrend wants AI agents to track project schedules, manage work orders, and integrate construction data into business reporting.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Construction financial data including budgets, bids, and change orders requires accurate handling. PRIVACY: Customer home data and communications are personal.

auth.notes: Buildertrend API uses OAuth 2.0 for authentication. Developer portal registration required. Application must be approved by Buildertrend developer team.

pricing.paid_tiers: Essential, Advanced, and Complete plans; pricing per user per month
pricing.notes: Residential construction SaaS. API access included with paid subscription. Developer registration required for API access.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Construction bid, budget, and change order data requires careful handling
PRIVACY: Homeowner contact and project data is personal
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with developer approval process
Developer application requires Buildertrend approval — allow time for onboarding
US-only data residency — international residential contractors should verify
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Construction financials. PRIVACY: Homeowner data. SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Construction financials and homeowner PII. SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US data residency.
